testcase.name: test_cooperative_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Token not in response assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI2OWE0NDJmN2QzYjRmNmRlNmZhOTdmMjEiLCJleHAiOjE3NzI0NjA3NDJ9.p0t-6tMkpmcKBDQfdfN9PD601opjp7-GFuSDw1sAqes', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'_id': '69a442f7d3b4f6de6fa97f21', 'carbon_goals': None, 'certifications': None, 'commission_rate': None, ...}}

testcase.failure: tests/test_carbon_premiums_ussd.py:39: in test_cooperative_login assert "token" in data, "Token not in response" E AssertionError: Token not in response E assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI2OWE0NDJmN2QzYjRmNmRlNmZhOTdmMjEiLCJleHAiOjE3NzI0NjA3NDJ9.p0t-6tMkpmcKBDQfdfN9PD601opjp7-GFuSDw1sAqes', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'_id': '69a442f7d3b4f6de6fa97f21', 'carbon_goals': None, 'certifications': None, 'commission_rate': None, ...}}
